philosophy.notes: 4 Framer Motion–style archetypes (masked reveal, domino stagger, slow float, wipe) match the cinematic brief. power4.out approximates the requested cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1) within <0.06 margin.

hierarchy.notes: Each archetype targets a clear role: headings→masked text, grids→staggered scale, hero/map→blur float, dark-section→wipe. Nothing competes.

execution.notes: GSAP+Lenis pipeline drives 22 animation modules. Auto-detection covers all 6 pages without HTML edits. Dedup guard prevents double-processing. Duration 0.85-1.2s, stagger 0.06-0.1s, viewport margin -100px equivalent.

specificity.notes: Every animation is TMH-tailored: cyan accent glows, dark navy glassmorphism wipe, Space Grotesk masked headings. No generic defaults.

restraint.notes: 4 archetypes is sufficient for the entire site. Masked reveal only fires on headings (not every text node). Wipe only on dark-section backgrounds. Reduced-motion respects all at root.
